# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

```yaml
name: CI/CD for pull request target with GitHub Actions 
on: [pull_request]   # Triggers on any pushes to the repository data will be available in the `github` context   
jobs:    
# This job is triggered when a new PR event happens. It checks out your code, installs dependencies and runs tests with yarn or npm  (depending upon package manager you have installed)   # The command that gets run on each trigger are defined in the `run` section below   
- name: Checkout Code    
  uses: actions/checkout@v2      
# This job is triggered when a new PR event happens. It checks out your code, installs dependencies and runs tests with yarn or npm (depending upon package manager you have installed)   # The command that gets run on each trigger are defined in the `run` section below   
- name: Setup Node Environment    
  uses: actions/setup-node@v2      
# This job is triggered when a new PR event happens. It checks out your code, installs dependencies and runs tests with yarn or npm (depending upon package manager you have installed)   # The command that gets run on each trigger are defined in the `run` section below   
  with:      
    node-version: '14'    
# This job is triggered when a new PR event happens. It checks out your code, installs dependencies and runs tests with yarn or npm (depending upon package manager you have installed)   # The command that gets run on each trigger are defined in the `run` section below   
- name: Install Dependencies    
  run: |      
      if [ -f package.json ] && [ "$(cat package.json)" != '{}' ]; then npm install; fi        # This line is for yarn, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $npm_cmd ]] || (git diff --quiet HEAD~1 2>/dev/null) ;then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else git submodule init && git submodule update; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(node -v) != 'v'${NODE_VERSION} ]] || [ "$npm_cmd" ]; then echo "Node version not installed. Please install Node v14." exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(python -v) != 'Python'${PYTHON_VERSION} ]] || [ "$npm_cmd" ]; then echo "Pyhton version not installed. Please install Python v3." exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(java -version) != 'openjdk' ]] || [ "$npm_cmd" ]; then echo "Java version not installed. Please install Java OpenJDK." exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(go version) == '' ]];then go mod tidy && git add . || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(npm -v) != '' ]];then yarn install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(pip -V) != '' ]];then pip install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(docker -v) != '' ]];then docker build . || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(gcc -v) != '' ]];then g++ build.cpp || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(rustc -V) != '' ]];then cargo build || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(cmake -V) != '' ]];then cmake . || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(php -v) != '' ]];then composer install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(perl -v) != '' ]];then perl Makefile.PL || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(ruby -v) != '' ]];then gem install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(swift -v) != '' ]];then pod install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(rust -v) != '' ]];then cargo build || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(go -v) != '' ]];then go build || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(java -v) != '' ]];then mvn clean install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(npm -v) != '' ]];then yarn build || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(python -v) != '' ]];then flask run || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(java -v) != '' ]];then mvn clean install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(python -v) != '' ]];then flask run || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(java -v) != '' ]];then mvn clean install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(python -v) != '' ]];then flask run || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(java -v) != '' ]];then mvn clean install || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true; fi        # This line is for npm, replace with your own command to handle dependencies   elif [[ $(python -v) != '' ]];then flask run || (git diff --staged | grep '^[a-z]') then echo "No changes detected" exit 0 else true;
